'''Gantor Mining Company''' was a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] corporation within the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. Their main mining product was [[Ore/Legends|ore]]. They have mining facilities in three house provinces: Calipsa; Pelagia; and Cadriaan.

{{Company-stub}}
